description: Letter or petition (هذا الاعراض) addressed to an Ottoman official, apparently with the rank of Kethüda (l. 1). In Arabic script. Dating: Probably 18th or 19th century. Deals with a family matter concerning a poor Jew named Khiḍr ىالمىو (Palombo?); this might be the same person as the Eliyyahu Palombo mentioned in several other Geniza documents from this period. The poor cousin (ibn ʿamm) of Khiḍr may have been married to the mother of the writer. Because of the repeated reference to the man's poverty, it seems the basis for this petition is the inheritance of money or property. In the last line, the writer asks that the diwan and the consul (القنسل) make a decision in the matter. (Information mainly from JRL catalogue). Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב או עצומה המופנה לפקיד עות'מאני בדרגת כתח'ודה. בכתב ערבי. תיארוך: כנראה מאה ה-18 או ה-19. עוסק בעניין משפחתי הנוגע ליהודי עני בשם ח'יד'ר (פלומבו?). בשורה האחרונה מבקש הכותב שהדיוואן והקונסול יכריעו בעניין. דרוש בדיקה נוספת.
